allow: PowerShell(if \($env:GEMINI_API_KEY\) { Write-Output "shell env has GEMINI_API_KEY: $\($env:GEMINI_API_KEY.Substring\(0,10\)\)..." } else { Write-Output "shell env: not set" }; [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('GEMINI_API_KEY','User'\); [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('GEMINI_API_KEY','Machine'\))
